name: zein-security-waf
description: Zein Security WAF - Advanced Web Application Firewall System

scripts.dev:simple: concurrently -n "DB,AI,Backend,Frontend" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:db: docker-compose up -d mysql redis || echo Docker services starting...
scripts.dev:ai: cd backend/ai-service && (py -m uvicorn ai:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5000 --reload || python -m uvicorn ai:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5000 --reload || python3 -m uvicorn ai:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5000 --reload)
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:ai && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && go build -o zein-waf main.go
scripts.build:ai: echo AI service uses Python, no build needed
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend/ai-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run setup:db

author: Zein Security
